name: cairn
description: Cairn — self-hosted, connected, day-reading wellness OS for training (lifting, running & hybrid), nutrition & longevity with an agentic coaching loop.

scripts.seed:art:build: mkdir -p data/seed-art-build && DATA_DIR=data/seed-art-build DB_PATH=data/seed-art-build/cairn.db tsx src/buildSeedArt.ts
scripts.reset: rm -f data/cairn.db data/cairn.db-* && npm run seed
scripts.backup: curl -fsS http://localhost:8787/api/export -o cairn-export.json && echo saved cairn-export.json
scripts.verify: npm run docs:check && npm run actions:check && node scripts/check-sw-cache.mjs && npm run launch:check && npm test
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run smoke
